title: bee-swarming: dispatch-time degenerate check, Advisor line in worker template, ladder budget note
action: Per D1/D2 and decision 0016 (orchestrator judges at dispatch): in the dispatch step, after the tier choice, resolve the advisor via resolveAdvisor(root, runtime) and run the degenerate check — include an Advisor line ONLY when an advisor resolves AND passes it: skip when the advisor resolves to the same model name as the worker's resolved model, and always skip for ceiling-tier workers; for distinct names use the known claude order (haiku < sonnet < opus) and otherwise presume an owner-configured advisor is stronger (cli shapes are presumed stronger by configuration intent). The Advisor line names the advisor identity and how to consult, per the PROVEN transport in the validation report (read_first): model shape -> the worker's own Agent tool with the model param and a description starting exactly 'advisor-consult <cell-id>: <advisor-model>' (dispatch.jsonl attribution, A2), with headless `claude -p --model <m>` as the stated fallback; cli shape -> the configured command with the evidence bundle on stdin, reusing the External Executors output-capture discipline in swarming-reference.md. Update the worker dispatch template in swarming-reference.md with the optional Advisor line. Add ONE note to the [BLOCKED] Rescue Ladder: an arriving [BLOCKED] already spent its consult budget; rung-1 re-dispatch grants a fresh budget. The ladder's rung structure is otherwise byte-unchanged (D1). Goal-check addition: a [DONE] whose report shows consults is goal-checked exactly like any other — advice never substitutes for fresh verify output.

truths: the ladder keeps its three rungs; only the budget note is added (D1)
the degenerate check is the orchestrator's, at dispatch, against the worker's resolved model (D2 + 0016)
a session whose config has no advisor slot dispatches byte-identical prompts to today

artifacts.substantive: dispatch-step advisor resolution + degenerate rule + ladder budget note
worker template carries the optional Advisor line with transport command

key_links: Advisor line fields match what adv-2's consult protocol expects the worker to run
prohibitions: no new rescue-ladder rung and no reordering (D1)
no orchestrator-level consult of the advisor (D1)
no change to reservation, wave, or goal-check contracts beyond the consult-aware sentence

trace.outcome: bee-swarming dispatch step gains orchestrator-side advisor resolution (resolveAdvisor at dispatch, after tier choice) with the D2/0016 degenerate check (same-model-name skip, ceiling-worker always-skip, claude order haiku<sonnet<opus, owner-configured/cli presumed stronger); worker prompt template carries the optional Advisor line with the proven transport (Agent tool + 'advisor-consult <cell-id>: <advisor-model>' description prefix, claude -p fallback; cli shape via stdin per External Executors); rescue ladder gains ONE consult-budget note (rungs byte-unchanged, D1); goal-check gains the consults-are-not-verify sentence
